title: Merremia palmeri
taxonomy: Merremia palmeri is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. It belongs to the genus Merremia, which consists of several species of morning glory-like plants. The plant is native to the Americas, specifically in the southwestern regions of the United States and northern Mexico. Merremia palmeri is an annual vine that grows in a variety of habitats, including deserts and dry scrublands. The plant's classification reflects its unique characteristics and adaptations to its native environments.
